title: Farm & Charm: Steamdeck Edition
description: Optimized modpack intended for use on the steamdeck!
body:
Farm & Charm: Steamdeck Edition
Cozy vibes, endless charm, and optimized for on-the-go gaming!

Overview
Farm & Charm: Steamdeck Edition is a modpack designed to create a relaxing, immersive experience that brings cozy vibes to Minecraft. Whether you’re tending your fields, automating your dream workshop, or exploring breathtaking landscapes, this modpack is perfect for players who want to enjoy a slower, more charming Minecraft adventure.

Key Features
🌾 Enhanced Farming: With Farmer’s Delight and companion mods, farming has never been more fulfilling! Enjoy new crops, meals, and farming mechanics that make living off the land more satisfying.
🌍 Breathtaking World Generation: Explore stunning terrain and biomes thanks to Terralith, which breathes new life into the Minecraft world.
⚙️ Creative Automation: Dive into the magic of automation with Create, giving you the tools to build intricate contraptions and streamline your survival.
🔨 Charming Details: Use [Let’s Do] to add roleplay mechanics and personality to your world, from sweeping your floors to hanging your laundry.
🪞 Immersive Perspective: Experience the game in a whole new way with First Person Model, bringing more life and personality to your player character.
🎨 Cozy Aesthetic: The modpack is curated with mods that enhance visual and gameplay elements to maintain a warm, inviting atmosphere.
Optimized for the Steam Deck
This modpack is built on Fabric 1.20.1 and is tailored to work seamlessly on the Steam Deck. Enjoy smooth performance and an intuitive setup process for your portable adventures!

Playstyle
Farm & Charm invites you to take your time and enjoy every step of your journey. Whether you're building, farming, automating, or exploring, the modpack is designed to feel like home.

Requirements
Minecraft 1.20.1
Fabric Loader (latest version recommended)
Optional: Shader compatibility (e.g., Complementary Reimagined) for extra visual charm.
Acknowledgments
This pack wouldn’t be possible without the incredible work of mod creators. A huge thanks to the teams behind Farmer’s Delight, Terralith, Create, [Let’s Do], and all other mods included in the pack!

Feedback & Support
Got questions or feedback? Drop a comment on the Modrinth page, and let’s make Farm & Charm: Steamdeck Edition the coziest experience possible!

**Artwork credit goes to Cjnator38. You can see other variants here**[https://www.steamgriddb.com/collection/14249](https://www.steamgriddb.com/collection/14249)
